---
name: Work Item
about: Track a bug, feature, or engineering task with clear scope and acceptance criteria
title: "[Work] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Summary

One short paragraph describing the requested change.

## Type

- [ ] Bug
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Problem / Context

What problem are we solving? Include user impact and current behavior.

## Scope

Describe what is in scope for this issue.

## Out of Scope

List explicitly what will not be done in this issue.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Validation Plan

List how this will be verified (unit/integration/e2e/manual checks).

## Risks / Dependencies

Mention rollout risk, migration risk, external dependencies, or blockers.

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, logs, or related issues/PRs.
